archetype_reasoning: Initial profile 2026-06-15. 240 resolved trades across 408 distinct markets. Contested-price share: 60% (0.10-0.80), avg price 0.57 — genuine directional betting pattern, not yield-harvesting. Overall accuracy: 72.9% (175W/65L). By category: Geopolitics 77% (86 resolved), Elections 74% (34 resolved), Unknown 70% (120 resolved). Active through June 7 2026 (last trade). Diverse markets: US Fed chair nominations, Ukraine ceasefire, Venezuela, Romania, Iran. Confidence is MEDIUM not HIGH because: (1) realized_pnl=$0.00 exactly is anomalous for 240 resolved trades with 72.9% accuracy — triggers STR-003 pnl exclusion filter and requires investigation; (2) category 'Unknown' for 50% of resolved trades means domain assessment is incomplete; (3) recent Feb 2026 cluster of losses on Fed nomination near-certainty entries suggests some yield-harvesting behavior at market peaks. Assignment as GENUINE_FORECASTER is based on the dominant 60% contested-price pattern and multi-domain accuracy.
